violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of appliances need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors in dish area and pantry areas need to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of microwave needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed food in hand sink.
Toilet facilities. — ---Observed toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor by grill and fryer needs to be cleaned.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
